summary: Tested print service fix for garbled text issue. All fixes verified: 1) printService.js correctly imports API_URL from api.js (line 7). 2) sendReceiptPrint uses ${API_URL}/print/render-receipt (line 130) instead of window.location.origin. 3) Kitchen printers automatically get show_prices:false (line 115). 4) Returns RENDER_FAILED instead of falling back to garbled plain text (line 156). Backend API /api/print/render-receipt works correctly for customer receipts (with prices) and kitchen receipts (without prices).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Kitchen printers automatically get show_prices:false (line 115)
VERIFIED: Returns RENDER_FAILED when server render fails (line 156) - no fallback to garbled plain text
VERIFIED: Backend /api/print/render-receipt returns successful response with raw_data for customer receipt
VERIFIED: Backend /api/print/render-receipt returns successful response with raw_data for kitchen receipt (no prices)
VERIFIED: POS page loads without JavaScript errors
VERIFIED: Categories, products, and cart sections visible on POS page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Print service fix verified. The fix addresses garbled text issue by: 1) Using API_URL from api.js instead of window.location.origin for render-receipt endpoint. 2) Automatically setting show_prices:false for kitchen printers. 3) Returning RENDER_FAILED instead of falling back to plain text when server render fails. Note: The print agent (localhost:9999) runs on user's local Windows machine and cannot be tested in preview environment - only the backend render-receipt API was tested.

verified_features.description: Uses API_URL from api.js instead of window.location.origin
Kitchen printers automatically get show_prices:false to hide prices
verified_features.code_location: line 115: const showPrices = isKitchen ? false : (printer.show_prices !== false)

verified_features.feature: No fallback to garbled plain text
verified_features.description: Returns RENDER_FAILED instead of falling back to plain text when server render fails
Returns successful response with raw_data for customer receipt (show_prices:true)
Returns successful response with raw_data for kitchen receipt (show_prices:false)
POS page loads without JavaScript errors, shows categories, products, and cart

notes: The print agent (localhost:9999) runs on the user's local Windows machine and cannot be tested in the preview environment. Testing focused on: 1) Backend render-receipt API correctness 2) Frontend code compilation and POS page loading 3) Verification that printService.js uses API_URL from api.js instead of window.location.origin 4) Verification that kitchen printers get show_prices:false automatically.
